commands.review_summary:
The PR changes doctor empty-allowlist scanning and policy code to suppress the parent group-allowlist warning when enabled accounts have effective group allowlists, and adds regression tests.

PR surface: Source +51, Tests +174. Total +225 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main checks the top-level channel record before account records and doctor preview wires that scanner into openclaw doctor output, so the reported false-positive path is source-reproducible.
